content: We can reframe Interactive Conferencing Modeling (ICM) streaming training as an intrinsic curiosity-driven active learning agent that autonomously shapes its own training data stream, rather than passively processing fixed sequential input batches. This allows the ICM training process to proactively prioritize ambiguous, high-information streaming segments that improve model generalization, similar to how an agent explores its environment to maximize learning progress.
source_topics: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
trigger_topic: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
